title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—CLI and Go library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: First-class LangChain LLM & chat interface for Ollama, enabling RAG, agents and memory pipelines.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; sync & async, streaming, embeddings, chat & generate endpoints.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (React) for Ollama—multi-model convos, code highlighting, RAG uploads.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive terminal UI for Ollama with syntax highlighting and history.

title: chainlit/chainlit (Ollama example)
summary: Chainlit UI cookbook showing how to build shareable LLM apps backed by Ollama models.

title: private-gpt (Ollama backend)
summary: PrivateGPT now supports Ollama as an inference backend for fully local RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma; ingest PDFs and chat over them locally.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions via Ollama models; slash commands & threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama for private/local AI assistance in channels & DMs.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node that exposes Ollama generate & chat actions in no-code workflows.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive wrappers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; supports streaming and model management.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for talking to Ollama; useful for desktop/mobile AI apps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama with async streaming, chat & embeddings support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete & summarization powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator & OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.
